trx_id ← 本事务
roll_pointer ← Undo Log 记录
数据字段 ← 新值
数据页变为脏页" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="316.25" y="530" width="215" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cY6w1St5mxv6v0nyYhtd-30" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="cY6w1St5mxv6v0nyYhtd-8" target="cY6w1St5mxv6v0nyYhtd-29"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cY6w1St5mxv6v0nyYhtd-8" value="⑤ 写 Redo Log Buffer
追加物理增量记录
LSN 单调递增" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="336.25" y="680" width="175" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cY6w1St5mxv6v0nyYhtd-9" value="⑥ 刷 Redo Log Buffer → 磁盘

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 233px; height: 1px; padding-top: 34px; margin-left: 53px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
BEGIN
分配 trx_id · 加入全局活跃事务集合 m_ids

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 213px; height: 1px; padding-top: 224px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
① 加表级 IX 意向锁
声明意图，供表锁快速冲突检测

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 193px; height: 1px; padding-top: 324px; margin-left: 71px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
② 加行级 X 锁 Record Lock
锁定目标行，阻塞其他写操作

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 213px; height: 1px; padding-top: 434px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
③ 写 Undo Log
旧行镜像 → Undo Tablespace
同时服务于回滚与 MVCC 版本链

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 213px; height: 1px; padding-top: 569px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
④ 修改 Buffer Pool 数据页
trx_id ← 本事务
roll_pointer ← Undo Log 记录
数据字段 ← 新值
数据页变为脏页

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 173px; height: 1px; padding-top: 709px; margin-left: 81px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
⑤ 写 Redo Log Buffer
追加物理增量记录
LSN 单调递增

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 183px; height: 1px; padding-top: 939px; margin-left: 76px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
⑥ 刷 Redo Log Buffer → 磁盘
WAL 完成，持久性 D 保障

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 183px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1039px; margin-left: 76px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
⑦ 移出 m_ids 活跃事务集合
Purge 水位线可能抬升

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 173px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1134px; margin-left: 81px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
⑧ 释放行锁 + 意向锁
阻塞事务可继续

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 191px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1224px; margin-left: 72px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
⑨ Undo Log 标记为可清除候选
由 Purge 线程异步回收

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 233px; height: 1px; padding-top: 134px; margin-left: 53px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: UPDATE 阶段（行修改原子链路）

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 233px; height: 1px; padding-top: 844px; margin-left: 51px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
